channel.title: about on StataViz by Asjad Naqvi
channel.description: Recent content in about on StataViz by Asjad Naqvi

item.title: Alluvial plot
item.description: Created using the alluvial package ssc install alluvial, replace For more info visit the stata-alluvial GitHub page.

item.title: Vienna's lifelines - public transport
item.description: Made for the #30DayMapChallenge 2022.

item.title: Distance to the nearest public bathroom in Vienna
treemap
item.description: Created using the treemap package ssc install treemap, replace For more info visit the stata-treemap GitHub page.

item.title: Rate of depletion of ground water
Population of Latin America at weighted dots
Population of Latin America at ASCII chars
Map clipping
item.description: Created using the clipgeo and spmap packages Install the packages: ssc install clipgeo, replace ssc install spmap, replace For more info visit the stata-clipgeo GitHub page.
